_comment: Hero Surface input grouping map (PR 3 of the 2026-04-20 Hero Surface deep-review). Documents the canonical surface-vs-operator partition for SMC_Dashboard.pine and SMC_Mobile_Dashboard.pine. Consumed by pine_input_surface.py regroup as a re-entrant safety net: re-running it must be a no-op against the current files. Surface inputs stay visible in the first product group; every BUS / operator-only binding stays in its own hidden group with display = display.none.
invariants: Every input in a Surface or Mobile Surface group is visible (no display.none).
Every input in any Operator Only group has display = display.none.
Hero state values are read exclusively from mp.HERO_* fields; surface code does not re-derive them.
